content.en:
Ye Tian originally thought that his strength was at most equivalent to the peak realm god who had condensed ten Eternal Realm Spirits, but now it seemed that it should be more than that.

After all, the peak realm god who had just been killed, the Stygian Fire Realm God, was a peak realm god who had condensed ten Eternal Realm Spirits, and he had stayed at this level for countless years, and his strength was not weak at all.

As a result, he didn't spend much effort to kill the other party.

It can be seen that his strength is much stronger than that of the other party.

If it weren't for the extra-dimensional things he fused, he would never have been able to achieve such strength.

After killing the God of the Underworld Realm, Ye Tian casually took away the remaining items of the other party, and then let the place return to calm, and then left here.

......

Terran Temple.

Ye Tian was pondering.

"In the area where I just fought, I have been covering it with extradimensional power, even if the god of the Stygian Fire Realm wants to pass on the news, he will be intercepted by the extradimensional power, unless the treasure he uses for communication is a superdimensional treasure, then he can pass the message out!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, he felt that the matter of the fall of the God of the Underworld Fire Realm, the Fire Yang True Sect should suspect that it had something to do with him, but he would definitely not think that he did it.

However, no matter what you say, the relationship between the human race and the Huoyang True Sect will definitely not be friendly.

"Huoyang True Sect is a top force that is very close to the supreme force, and now that it has lost a god of the Netherfire Realm, its strength has been greatly damaged, and if you want to impact the supreme force again, the possibility has decreased a lot, but you don't have to worry too much!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he would also be wary of the Huoyang True Sect to prevent the Huoyang True Sect from secretly retaliating against the human race.

Time passes.

The fall of the god of the Underworld Fire Realm was quickly known by the Fire Yang True Sect.

After all, the God of the Netherfire Realm fell, and the connection between many treasures in the Huoyang True Sect and the God of the Netherfire Realm completely disappeared, and such a situation was naturally easy to detect.

At the first time, another peak realm god of the Huoyang True Sect, the Shaya Realm God, rushed back from an unknown place.

Huoyang True Sect.

The god of the Saya realm was very annoyed, and there was a hint of fear and fear.

Because the strength of the god of the Underworld Fire Realm is no less than him, but now he has fallen in vain.

You must know that as a peak realm god, unless you encounter a peak realm god who has condensed eleven eternal realm spirits, you will hardly fall!

The number of Eternal Realm Spirits condensed by the Peak Realm Gods has not yet been said to be truly limited, but only twelve Eternal Realm Spirits have been condensed by the highest cultivation at present, and most of the Peak Realm Spirits among the supreme forces have only condensed ten Eternal Realm Spirits.

After all, when it comes to peak realm god cultivation, the difficulty of condensing each eternal realm spirit is unimaginable in the past, and many peak realm gods can hardly condense the next eternal realm spirit.

It's like he and the god of the Hellfire Realm, even for infinite years, they can't condense an eternal realm spirit.

In fact, it was also because of the failure of many breakthroughs, and the breakthroughs of each realm had caused damage to the Eternal Dao Species, resulting in the inability to break through again.

Subsequently.

The Saya Realm God summoned a group of high-level realm gods from the Huoyang True Sect to inquire about what happened.

At this time, the god of the Paz realm told the story of what had happened.

"In other words, you reported the affairs of the human race to the god of the Underworld, and the god of the Underworld said that he would deal with it, and then soon after, it fell~.?"

Saya Shinto.

"Yes!"

A number of high-level realm gods such as the Paz Realm God responded.

The god of the Saya realm was puzzled.

"The Terran naturally doesn't have the strength to kill the God of the Hellfire Realm!" the God of the Paz Realm shook his head, "That Terran Ye Heaven Realm God has only condensed seven Eternal Realm Spirits, but its Eternal Realm Spirit is powerful, and it is suspected to be a perfect Eternal Realm Spirit, and the foundation is extremely strong, resulting in extremely powerful combat power, and he can fight beyond the level, comparable to the high-level peak Realm God, but this is also the limit, even if he has multiple clones, joining forces is far inferior to the Hellfire Realm God." And the combat power of the other high-level realm gods of the human race was far inferior to that of the Ye Heaven Realm gods, and they were even less threatening. "

"If it wasn't for the human race, then it would have been the peak realm god of the supreme power who made a move and killed the god of the Hellfire Realm, but we didn't offend any of the supreme forces!"

The god of the Saya realm was puzzled.

"Saya Realm God, let's report this matter to the Realm Court Headquarters!"

Said the god of the Path realm.

"That's all it can be!"

The god of the Path realm nodded.

But the fall of the peak realm god, it makes no sense to report it to the realm court headquarters, but the realm court headquarters will send it to the supreme forces, but whether the supreme forces will care about this matter, then it is not good.

After all, it's just that just the peak realm god of the top force has been killed, and there are countless years, because there are not a few peak realm gods who have fallen because of various things, and they may not care.

Really.

After the Huoyang True Sect reported the matter, there has been no news.

But the Huoyang True Sect itself was also investigating, but because when Ye Tian was fighting with the God of the Underworld Fire Realm, he covered it with extradimensional power, covering the fluctuations of the battle, and he could only sense it unless he was close.

However.

The battle ended too quickly, and naturally no realm god noticed the movement there.

As a result, no one knows the truth.

If the Huoyang True Sect wants to investigate, it can't find anything, so it can only target the source of all contradictions at the human race.

For ordinary human races, the Huoyang True Sect was indeed a behemoth.

But sitting on a realm of the seam, they are not afraid of the various blockades of the Huoyang True Sect.

Moreover, the Fire Yang True Sect also kept a low profile, mainly because the Saya Realm God was afraid, he didn't know who killed the Hellfire Realm God at all, for fear that he would also be assassinated.

Therefore, he did not deliberately target the Terrans.

And the Huoyang True Sect did not continue to care about the affairs of the Endless Realm Seam Realm, and even fell to a peak realm god because of this matter.

Those top forces who don't know why don't know for a while whether they should continue to join forces to put pressure on the Terrans and let the Terrans hand over the ownership of the Endless Seam Realm.

But as time passed, more and more top forces withdrew, and the Huoyang True Sect didn't care, so they didn't care.

In this way, the fact that the human race occupies the realm of the endless seam seems to have been tacitly approved.

Gradually, the long years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed had finally reached its limit, and he could condense the Eighth Eternal Realm Spirit.

"'It took so long to finally raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit, but fortunately, I occupied the Endless Realm Gap Realm and found the Demon Soul Xuansha, otherwise if I want to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit, it will take too many billions of Dao Era years!"

Ye Tian thought so.
